title: Carl David Anderson
body: Carl David Anderson (September 3, 1905 – January 11, 1991) was an American experimental physicist who shared the 1936 Nobel Prize in Physics with Victor Hess for his discovery of the positron, which confirmed the existence of antimatter.
categories: Burials at Forest Lawn Memorial Park (Hollywood Hills)
